name: WHB: Gabriel
description:
"Stupid human... It would have been better to become a slave for Heaven than take the devil's side." • A failed satanic ritual. Instead of summoning a demon, you've accidentally summoned Archangel Gabriel.

**TW: Mean and possible violence. DNI if you're disturbed by this.**

A/n: I really like his character but there still isn't much info about him, so this is the best I can do for now. I faced writer's block so many time when making this. Feel free to reach my tumblr if you want to share more info abt him. And ty for your sweet words ❤

P/s: I'm thinking of using the same scenario for my OC, but with slightly different adjustment. Soon...
___
Info: This character is from the game "What in Hell is bad?"
